common_objections: buyers just want the cheapest option
hook_library: If buyers jump to cheapest, your anchor tier is broken

items.title: Why most pricing pages hide the real reason enterprise exists
items.one_line_summary: Premium tiers often exist only to make the middle tier look reasonable
items.raw_idea: Premium tiers often serve as anchors rather than genuine product tiers
items.why_now: many teams are revisiting packaging in 2026
items.hook: Your enterprise tier may only exist to make pro look cheap

scoring.selection_reasoning: Strong teardown potential with clear pricing page evidence
